brief: US-Iran tensions escalate as Trump threatens to reinstate a blockade and charge tolls on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, while domestic news includes a fatal ICE shooting in Maine and the death of Senator Lindsey Graham. Meanwhile, new research explores configurable AI coding assistants and the behavioral implications of mandatory wearable sensing.
news_summary: Trump claims the US will reinstate an Iranian blockade and impose a 20% toll on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz, raising fears of renewed conflict. Domestically, an anti-ICE protest erupts after a fatal shooting during an immigration operation in Maine, and Senator Lindsey Graham's death sparks a succession debate.
papers_summary: Papers highlight human-computer interaction themes: one study designs configurable AI coding assistants for developers who want control, while another examines behavioral probing in mandatory wearable sensing systems used in high-stakes institutional settings.

en.brief: US-Iran tensions escalate as Trump threatens to reinstate a blockade and charge tolls on ships in the Strait of Hormuz, while domestic news includes a fatal ICE shooting in Maine and the death of Senator Lindsey Graham. Meanwhile, new research explores configurable AI coding assistants and the behavioral implications of mandatory wearable sensing.
en.news_summary: Trump claims the US will reinstate an Iranian blockade and impose a 20% toll on ships crossing the Strait of Hormuz, raising fears of renewed conflict. Domestically, an anti-ICE protest erupts after a fatal shooting during an immigration operation in Maine, and Senator Lindsey Graham's death sparks a succession debate.
en.papers_summary: Papers highlight human-computer interaction themes: one study designs configurable AI coding assistants for developers who want control, while another examines behavioral probing in mandatory wearable sensing systems used in high-stakes institutional settings.

zh.brief: 曼谷酒吧大火造成至少27死，目擊者描述逃生過程；美國參議員葛蘭姆辭世，特朗普盟友結構生變；颱風巴威橫掃華東後北移，河北洪水沖走汽車；英國首相選舉貝安德拜相幾成定局。學術方面，AI編碼助手與強制穿戴感測研究受關注。
zh.news_summary: 曼谷酒吧火災至少27死22重傷，目擊者稱爆炸將人拋出；美國參議員葛蘭姆突辭世，特朗普推其妹接任；颱風巴威襲華東北移，河北洪水致1800人被困；英國首相選舉貝安德呼聲高，國際反應備受關注；Pokemon Go十週年仍有數百萬玩家活躍。
zh.papers_summary: 學術研究探討可配置AI編碼助手如何讓開發者掌控行為，以及高風險機構中強制穿戴感測系統的隱私問題，另有論文分析學生與LLM輔導互動中的微觀反饋特徵。

todays_image.caption: As Lobophora sp. spreads its branching fronds across the seafloor, the Trump administration is expanding its reach into private companies, eyeing AI as the next frontier to absorb.
todays_image.title: Lobophora sp.
